rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance.
Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban in any curriculum or training surface.
No stale markers, no 'fixed' retrospectives, no session biography.
Register match.
Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
Always 'you', never 'the student'; teacher framing stays out of body.
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
Over-hedge detector.
Cap practitioner attribution at one student-side mention per module.
Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream.
Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body.
Watch out for planting jargon too early.
No combative verbs about the agent in body prose.
Aspirational destination, never corrective gap.
Earn every technical term on first use.
Business-audience word ban (Bootstrap default).
Memory vs context — use deliberately.
No em-dashes. Simple sentences.
LLM-vs-agent-vs-Claude vocabulary discipline.
No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
Reflection beats stay invisible in the flow.
No placeholders inside fenced blocks.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 48-54: Debrief prompt block contains no [BRACKETS] or placeholders.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 46: 'Ask Claude to review this session and compound 1-5 security operating rules into the agent system' — action lead-in present and semantic.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block.
Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 48-54: No path leaks in prompt block.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Chain prompts by back-reference and deterministic path, never by invented alias.
Markdown shout inside fenced prompt blocks is dead weight in Claude Code.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 48-54: No markdown shout (**bold**, *italic*) inside the fence.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Artifact destinations are explicit subpaths, never naked filenames (Bootstrap-specific).
Mood contract named.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 3-4: Big Idea frames the discipline (checking) over certainty. Maintainer notes (88-110) document mood as unease, epistemic not punitive (line 89: 'Evaluate residual risk plainly').

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Epistemic mood ≠ punitive mood.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 33: 'Certainty is a fantasy; the discipline is the answer' frames not-knowing as the operative state, not failure.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 3-4: 'The discipline is running the check' — positive discipline lead.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity check.
Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 32-40: Key Concepts surface Bootstrap themes — grounded practice (discipline, evidence, operating rules), ownership (build and keep), iterative refinement (loop, mitigation, residual risk).
